content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_Expenses
 --drop view BI_Expenses

AS

    SELECT 
        FG.YEA4 AS [Year],
        FG.JRNO AS [Journal Number],
        FG.JSNO AS [Journal Sequence Number],
        FG.TRCD AS [Transaction Code],
        FG.VSER AS [Voucher Number Series],
        FG.VONO AS [Voucher Number],
        FG.VDSC AS [Voucher Name],
        FP.SUNO AS [Supplier],
        CM.SUNM AS [Supplier Name],
        FG.ACDT AS [Invoice Date],
        FG.AIT1 AS [GL],
        FCH.TX40 AS [GL Description],
        FG.AIT1,
        FG.AIT1 + ' - ' + L1.TX40 AS [Dimension 1],
        FG.AIT2,
        FG.AIT2 + ' - ' + L2.TX40 AS [Dimension 2],
        FG.AIT3,
        FG.AIT3 + ' - ' + L3.TX40 AS [Dimension 3],
        FG.AIT4,
        FG.AIT4 + ' - ' + L4.TX40 AS [Dimension 4],
        FG.AIT5,
        FG.AIT5 + ' - ' + L5.TX40 AS [Dimension 5],
        FG.AIT6,
        FG.AIT7,
        FG.VTXT AS [Voucher Text],
        FG.ACQT AS [QTY],
        FG.ACAM AS [Amount],
        FG.ECAR AS [State],
        FG.VSNO AS [Voucher Sequence Number]
    FROM M3.FGLEDG AS FG
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT VONO, JRNO, SUNO FROM M3.FPLEDG) FP ON FG.VONO = FP.VONO AND FG.JRNO = FP.JRNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.CIDMAS AS CM ON CM.SUNO = FP.SUNO
    LEFT JOIN M3.FCHACC AS FCH ON FCH.AITM = FG.AIT1
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L1 ON FG.AIT1 = L1.AITM AND L1.AITP = 1
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L2 ON FG.AIT2 = L2.AITM AND L2.AITP = 2
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L3 ON FG.AIT3 = L3.AITM AND L3.AITP = 3
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L4 ON FG.AIT4 = L4.AITM AND L4.AITP = 4
    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AITP, AITM, TX40 FROM M3.FCHACC) L5 ON FG.AIT5 = L5.AITM AND L5.AITP = 5
    WHERE FG.YEA4 > '2025'
    AND ( (FG.AIT1 >= '500000' AND FG.AIT1 < '800000') OR FG.AIT1 IN ('158000', '158500'))
